prose:
Phenol Fukui reactivity indices computed using DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF) in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Neutral, cation (charge +1, mult 2), and anion (charge −1, mult 2) geometries sourced from the input phenol.xyz file. Mulliken partial charges computed; Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor derived from charge differences. Most electrophilic site: carbon atom 3 (ortho to OH, f⁺ = 2.103). Most nucleophilic site: oxygen atom 1 (hydroxyl group, f⁻ = 0.162). Fukui charge conservation verified (Σ f⁺ = 1.0000, Σ f⁻ = 1.0000); all SCF convergence checks passed. Integrity status: trustworthy. Visualization: fukui reactivity plot saved to agent output directory.</prose>
<parameter name="value">2.103
